steps_completed.task: Wire validate_conditional_range_bounds() into normalize_probability_edit_payload() after base_marginals resolution, before validate_structure_preserving_edit, guarded by non-empty context
Add unit tests for compute_conditional_admissible_range(): binary market normal case, N>2 outcomes, all-zero non-target marginals edge case, rounding edge cases near 0 and 1

Add integration tests for validate_conditional_range_bounds() through normalize_probability_edit_payload(): conditional edit within range succeeds, conditional edit outside range returns 400 with conditional_range_violation and includes admissible range in details, unconditional edit bypasses the check entirely. Updated 2 existing tests whose error code changed from invalid_structure_preserving_edit to conditional_range_violation due to earlier interception.
